data.title: Century Aluminum Applauds President Trump for Executive Order to Fully Enforce Sec. 232 Aluminum Tariffs
data.description: In Chicago on April 2, 2026, Century Aluminum Company (NASDAQ: CENX) expressed approval for President Donald Trump’s latest executive order aimed at closing valuation loopholes exploited by importers to circumvent the tariffs on steel and aluminum. This move is expected to provide a fairer market for American manufacturers. The Section 232 tariff on primary aluminum remains constant at 50 percent, ensuring consistency in trade policies.

data.title: Unox Supports Future of Foodservice Design at FEED26
data.description: A design workshop called FEED26, organized by the FCSI Educational Foundation, has received sponsorship from Unox. This workshop is exclusive, and aims to nurture the talents of upcoming foodservice professionals. Unox's investment in this initiative underscores their commitment to supporting the industry's future.

data.title: Newmark Arranges $210 Million Sale of Trophy Worldcenter Retail in Downtown Miami
data.description: The recent deal marks the biggest non-mall retail sale in South Florida since 2017, with Newmark Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: NMRK) revealing the successful arrangement of a $210 million transaction for the retail component of Miami Worldcenter. The deal was announced on April 2, 2026, showcasing the thriving retail capital market business managed by Newmark.

data.title: CEO James Heckman clarifies equity status and announces one-year lock, ensuring stability and commitment.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 5.2%, a slight increase from the previous month. The total number of unemployed individuals stands at 9.8 million, with a notable rise in youth unemployment at 12.5%. Additionally, the report highlighted an increase in job vacancies by 3%, indicating potential opportunities for those seeking employment. The overall labor force participation rate remains steady at 62.3%, showing a stable trend in workforce engagement. These numbers shed light on the current economic situation and the challenges faced by many individuals in securing stable employment.
